headline: One call replaces a hundred emails.
lede: Access 600+ selected European group hotels through one dedicated contact, with direct contracts and fast turnaround.
s2_heading: We don't knock on doors. We already have the keys.
s3_heading: What you get, working with one contact
testimonial_quote: "Stream2 gives us one contact for hotel contracting instead of dozens. It's cut our sourcing time significantly, and the contracts always come directly from the hotel."
testimonial_cite: Contracting Manager, Top 3 Spanish Tour Operator
